title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 -  24  - 2017: Strava Pages.

enrichment.summary: Kyle explains why he skipped vlogging for two days: he got sidetracked building a Strava page for his website, ran into repeated screen-capture crashes on his old, slow computer, and outlines his plan to fix it (add storage, call Apple, try alternative software). He also briefly mentions a top speed of 67.28 mph on a descent, plans to upgrade his computer, reduce weed use, and lower the price of his car to sell it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: regrets using it so long — it's about 10x slower and kept crashing during screen captures
committed to finishing it despite the setbacks
considering reducing or quitting to improve sleep and performance
lowering the price to $16,000 to move it quickly and get cash

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't do a vlog for the last two days because I started working on a strap.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to buy a friend a few days ago.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went out to board and wanted to go to a super park but didn't tell three.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to war and came back through lines.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I recorded a video and tried to edit it, but wanted to get fancy by including a strawberry segment.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have the movies needed to attach a screen capture to YouTube.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I decided to focus on finishing the store page for my website, which is super basic right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built the website on my old computer, which is 10 times slower than my new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't know why I used the old computer for so long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My new computer is much better, but I'm still having issues with screen captures crashing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The screen capture crashes every 20 seconds, making it hard to work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried to show the data on straw for five seconds in a screen capture, but it kept crashing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished one video capture, but it crashed afterward.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to call Apple to see if increasing storage fixes the crashing issue.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If increasing storage doesn't work, I'll ask Apple for another program or solution.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I lost motivation to write outside because my reddit was outside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did some climbing and reached a top speed of 67.28 miles per hour.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to retire soon because I'm already on the inside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I only ride enough to not mess up my lungs or sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might quit smoking weed for a while to focus on carving.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm reducing the price of something to $16,000 to get rid of it for the summer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to get a job to live off the money from selling my car.
